en: We can sort it out. Just take some of your make-up off.
I'm not wearing any make-up. What? What has happened? I have never seen you look so good.
No, I don't know. I just woke up looking amazing and then everyone's gonna think I got a fucking facial for my
ko: 아니, 모르겠어. 그냥 일어나서 이렇게 멋져 보여.

en: mother's funeral. Oh, what the hell? You look incredible.
ko: 아, 대체 뭐야? 너 정말 멋져 보여.

en: We're trying to mess her up. Just no matter what I do with my hair, it just keeps falling in this really chic way.
Oh, God. You look perfect. Thank you.
Sorry, girls. People are starting to arrive. Thank you.
ko: 미안해, 얘들아. 사람들이 도착하기 시작했어. 고마워.

en: You don't have to greet them if it's too... Gosh, you look gorgeous.
ko: 너무 힘들면 인사 안 해도 돼... 와, 너 정말 아름다워. 고마워.

en: Thank you. You look glorious. Thank you.
Have you spoken to Dad? No, not yet. He's avoiding me.
My deepest condolences, girls. She was magnificent.
ko: 깊은 애도를 표해, 얘들아. 그녀는 훌륭한 분이었어. 정말 고마워.

en: Thanks so much. My God, you look well. Thank you. Have you?
No, he's not really engaging. She was a spectacular woman.
ko: 아니, 그는 별로 대화에 참여하지 않아.

en: Thank you. Darling, you look wonderful. Oh, my God. Hi, Claire.
ko: 자기야, 너 정말 멋져 보여. 오, 세상에. 안녕, 클레어. 안녕. 와.
